name: gpt-oss-120b
_comment_n_kv: HF config sets head_dim=64 explicitly (not H/n_q=45). True KV/token = 2 * 8 * 64 * b = 1024b. Framework infers d_head=H/n_q=45, so we adjust n_kv from 8 to 11 to recover H_kv ≈ 8 * 64 = 512 (n_kv=11 gives 495, ~3% under). Attention FLOPs are approximate.
_comment_bytes_per_param: MXFP4 quantization (quant_method=mxfp4 in HF config) → b=0.5. The HF converter defaults to b=2 (BF16); overridden here to match the deployed precision.
_comment_attention_window: Half the layers (alternating) use sliding-window attention with W=128 instead of full S=context_length attention. Framework treats all layers as full attention; KV cache and attention compute are over-estimated for context lengths > 128. Acceptable for first-cut comparison; tracked under sliding-window attention in scratch/model_specific_extensions.md.
_comment_moe: All 36 layers are MoE (no dense layers). 128 experts per layer, top-k=4. I_moe = intermediate_size = 2880. SwiGLU activation.
